global.description: The ad features a combination of bold text and abstract shapes on a vibrant background.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel booking service with ease of use.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: RouteBloon UGC
elements.description: A bold, uppercase text in a large font, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Fly smarter
elements.description: A medium-sized text in a clear font, positioned below the headline, conveying a sense of ease and efficiency.

elements.label: Hotels + flights in one tap
elements.description: A smaller text that complements the main message, providing additional information in a straightforward manner.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Abstract geometric shapes in soft colors that create a visually appealing background for the ad.

elements.label: Book now
elements.description: A prominent button with rounded edges, inviting users to take action, displayed in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Top left icon
elements.description: A small circular shape located at the top left corner, possibly an icon or logo.

elements.label: Bottom decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape at the bottom center, serving as a decorative element.

elements.label: Middle decorative shape
elements.description: An irregular shape positioned in the middle of the ad, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Top background text
elements.description: A large text element that serves as a background feature, enhancing the overall design.

elements.label: Fly smarter Hotels flights
elements.description: A clear and concise text that communicates the service offered, positioned centrally.
elements.text_content: Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear and inviting button at the bottom of the ad, encouraging immediate action.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text, with the CTA button at the bottom.
